items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• How are you? He opens the office at 8:00
• 1- How are you?
• 2- Do you need to go to the bathroom now?
• 3- What time do you get up?
• 4- Where do you need to go this afternoon?

items.text: How are you? He opens the office at 8:00
2- Do you need to go to the bathroom now?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu preciso ir ao mercado hoje à noite Eu prefiro ir ao banco amaná cedo
options: I need to go to the store tonight I prefer to go to the bank tomorrow morning 3.
morning tomorrow bank the to go to prefer I tonight store the to go to need I
I need to go to the store tonight I prefer to go to the bank tomorrow morning
You need to go to the store tonight I prefer to go to the bank tomorrow morning

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Como vai você? Ele abre o escritório às 8 hora s
options: 8:00 at office the opens He you? are How
How are you? He opens the office at 8:00 2.
How are you? He opens the office at 8:00
How are you? He opens the office at 8:00 3.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Ele come Você come Você tem Ela tem

items.answer: 3- What time do you get up?
4- Where do you need to go this afternoon?
